page.content: The table presents various metrics related to perceived product attributes, perceived risks, risk averseness, price quality inference, awareness of societal consequences, subjective norms, affordability-related perceptions, availability-related perceptions, accessibility-related perceptions, behavioral intention, and the total scale. For perceived product attributes (PA), the mean is 38.92, variance is 23.437, standard deviation is 4.841, Cronbach’s Alpha is 0.566, and the number of items is 10. For perceived risks (PR), the mean is 21.11, variance is 11.432, standard deviation is 3.381, Cronbach’s Alpha is 0.749, and the number of items is 5.

page.content: Risk averseness (RA) shows a mean of 17.90, variance of 4.798, standard deviation of 2.190, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.567, and 4 items. Price quality inference (PQ) has a mean of 14.63, variance of 16.619, standard deviation of 4.077, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.788, and 4 items. Awareness of societal consequences (ASC) reports a mean of 12.22, variance of 6.396, standard deviation of 2.529, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.685, with 3 items. For subjective norms (SN), the mean is 7.56, variance is 4.027, standard deviation is 2.007, Cronbach’s Alpha is 0.804, and 2 items. Affordability-related perceptions (AF) have a mean of 15.35, variance of 19.806, standard deviation of 4.450, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.691, and 5 items. Availability-related perceptions (AV) report a mean of 9.42, variance of 8.529, standard deviation of 2.920, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.579, and 3 items. Accessibility-related perceptions (AC) have a mean of 9.53, variance of 7.605, standard deviation of 2.758, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.437, and 3 items. Behavioral intention (BI) records a mean of 7.10, variance of 4.010, standard deviation of 2.003, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.520, and 2 items. The total scale aggregates to a mean of 153.56, variance of 340.723, standard deviation of 18.459, Cronbach’s Alpha of 0.862, and 41 items.
